description: A customer has reported an issue with a finished product. A quality engineer needs to trace the lot number of a specific component used in that product.

nodes.task_description: Find the finished product's serial number in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the specific unit that was shipped to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the product's genealogy or 'as-built' record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up a record showing every component and sub-assembly used to build that specific unit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the lot number of the specific component in question from the genealogy record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds and reports the lot number of the component.
